title: plexipus latifolius var. glabrescens
intro: Plexipus latifolius var. glabrescens, also known as the glabrous form of the broad-leaved plexipus, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to China and Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Plexipus latifolius var. glabrescens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
